components.name: Alert
components.useWhen: surfacing a page or section-level message in a semantic tone (info, success, warning, destructive); use the future Banner for app-spanning system messages

components.name: AlertDialog
components.useWhen: confirming a destructive or irreversible action where accidental dismissal must be impossible (use Dialog for non-destructive focused tasks)

components.name: Avatar
components.useWhen: rendering a single user or organization avatar with image + initials fallback (the fallback shows automatically on image load failure)

components.name: Badge
components.useWhen: rendering a compact status, label, or filter chip with optional leading or trailing icon and optional dismiss button

components.name: BadgeWithOverflow
components.useWhen: rendering a single status badge that may be paired with a "+N" overflow indicator

components.name: Button
components.useWhen: rendering an interactive trigger that may need a loading state, leading or trailing icon, or asChild composition into a link

components.name: Checkbox
components.useWhen: rendering a single boolean choice that commits on form submit (use Switch for immediate-effect toggles)

components.name: Command
components.useWhen: building a searchable command palette or large typeahead-filtered picker (use Select for short fixed-option lists)

components.name: ContextMenu
components.useWhen: attaching a right-click contextual menu to a region (always pair with a DropdownMenu equivalent for touch users)

components.name: Dialog
components.useWhen: interrupting flow with a focused task or confirmation that requires the page to stop (use AlertDialog for destructive confirmations, Sheet to preserve context)

components.name: Drawer
components.useWhen: presenting a touch-first bottom-anchored panel with swipe-to-dismiss (use Sheet for desktop-first slide-overs, Dialog for focused tasks)

components.name: DropdownMenu
components.useWhen: rendering an anchored menu opened from a button (use ContextMenu for right-click, Menubar for desktop top bar, Command for searchable)

components.name: HoverCard
components.useWhen: showing a hover-triggered preview card with rich content (use Tooltip for short hint text, Popover for click-triggered panels)

components.name: Input
components.useWhen: rendering a single-line text input that may need a leading or trailing slot, clear button, password reveal toggle, or async loading indicator

components.name: InputOTP
components.useWhen: rendering a one-time-password or verification-code field split into per-character slots

components.name: Kbd
components.useWhen: displaying a keyboard key or chord hint inline (use KbdGroup to compose multi-key shortcuts with consistent spacing)

components.name: Label
components.useWhen: attaching an accessible text caption to a form control via htmlFor (placeholders are not labels)

components.name: Menubar
components.useWhen: building a document-style desktop top menu bar (rare in SaaS dashboards — prefer sidebar navigation + dropdown menus)

components.name: NavigationMenu
components.useWhen: building a marketing-site top navigation with hover mega-menus (dashboard navigation belongs in the Sidebar primitive)

components.name: Popover
components.useWhen: presenting a click-triggered anchored panel for a short interaction (use HoverCard for hover previews, Tooltip for hint text, Sheet for full panels)

components.name: Progress
components.useWhen: showing determinate 0-100 progress (use Spinner when the percentage is unknown)

components.name: RadioGroup
components.useWhen: rendering 2-7 mutually exclusive options that benefit from being all visible at once (use Select for longer lists)

components.name: Select
components.useWhen: rendering a single-choice picker with a fixed list of options and no need for typeahead search

components.name: Separator
components.useWhen: drawing a thin horizontal or vertical line between sibling content groups that need a visible boundary beyond plain spacing

components.name: Sheet
components.useWhen: presenting detail or actions in a slide-over panel that preserves the underlying page context (use Dialog for focused tasks that need full attention)

components.name: Skeleton
components.useWhen: showing a per-region loading placeholder shaped like the content it will replace (prefer over a spinner for first-load views with multiple async tiles)

components.name: Slider
components.useWhen: rendering a single or range numeric input over a continuous scale where relative position matters more than exact value

components.name: Spinner
components.useWhen: indicating in-flight async work inline within a small UI region (use Skeleton for page or region-level loading where the eventual layout matters)

components.name: Switch
components.useWhen: rendering an immediately-actioned on/off toggle (use Checkbox if the change should commit on form submit)

components.name: Textarea
components.useWhen: rendering a multi-line text input that may need a character counter or autoresize behavior

components.name: Toaster
components.useWhen: mounting the global toast container at the app root (call the exported toast() from feature code to fire a toast)

components.name: Toggle
components.useWhen: rendering a single press-and-hold two-state control (use Switch for settings, ToggleGroup for mutually exclusive picks)

components.name: ToggleGroup
components.useWhen: rendering a small set of related Toggles that should look unified and share a single-or-multiple selection rule

components.name: Tooltip
components.useWhen: surfacing short hint text on hover or focus (use HoverCard for rich preview content, never put critical info in a tooltip)
